name: Hot Pineapple Casserole
directions: Mix sugar and flour in mixing bowl.
Drain Pineapple, add cheddar cheese - mix thoroughly.
Combine dry and wet mixtures, pour into greased full pan.
Crush Ritz crackers and add melted butter to them. Pour this mixture over pineapple and cheese mixture.
Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until golden brown.

name: Pineapple Stuffing
directions: Cream butter and sugar.
Add eggs, 1 at a time.
Stir in pineapple.
Fold in bread cubes.
Place in 1 1/2 quart casserole dish.
Bake 1 hour at 350 F degrees.

name: Pineapple Casserole
directions: Mix all ingredients together.
Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes.

name: Hot Pineapple Dish
directions: Drain pineapple, reserving 3 TBS.
juice.
Combine sugar and flour and stir in reserved juice; add cheese and pineapple chunks, mixing well.
Spoon mixture into greased 1 quart casserole.
Combine cracker crumbs and margarine; stirring well; sprinkle over pineapple mixture.
Bake 20- 30 min.
til crumbs are lightly browned.
Serves 4-6.

name: Baked Pineapple Casserole
directions: Mix the 1st four ingredients together and pour into a greased baking pan.
Melt the butter in a large skillet.
Break the bread into small squares and drop into the melted butter.
Stir, being careful not the make the bread mushy, until the bread has soaked up the butter.
Spread bread evenly over the 1st mixture.
Bake at 325°F for 30 minutes.

name: Baked Pineapple
directions: Drain pineapple reserving 4 T juice.
Combine pineapple, reserved juice, butter, flour, and cheese.
Mix well.
Spoon mixture into a buttered 1 1/2 quart baking dish; top with cracker or corn flake crumbs.
Bake at 350 degrees F for 30 minutes, or until bubbly.

name: Pineapple Casserole
directions: Preheat oven to 325 degrees.
Mix flour and sugar.
Add eggs, pineapple, butter and blend.
Put cubed bread in bottom of greased baking pan.
Pour pineapple mixture over.
Bake uncovered 30-40 minutes.
Serve warm.

name: Pineapple-Cheese Casserole
directions: Drain pineapple, reserving 6T juice.
Melt 1/4 cup butter in a 2 qt.
baking dish; add pineapple and cheese.
Combine sugar, flour and reserved juice in bowl; mix well.
Spread over pineapple mixture.
Toss crushed crackers with 1/4 cup melted butter.
Sprinkle over top.
Bake, covered at 350 degrees for 45 minutes.

name: Pineapple Casserole by Carolee
directions: Add sugar and flour to pineapple.
Add two to three cups of grated cheddar cheese and stir together.
Place in a greased casserole dish and cover with one sleeve of crushed Ritz crackers.
Drizzle with one stick of melted butter.
Bake for 45 minutes at 350°F until warmed through and crumbs are browned.

name: Pineapple Casserole
directions: Pour drained pineapple into baking dish.
Mix sugar, pineapple juice and flour.
Pour over pineapple and stir.
Stir in grated cheese.
Mix crushed crackers with melted margarine and spread over cheese.
Bake at 350 º F for 30 minutes.

name: Pineapple and Sweet Potato Casserole
directions: Combine pineapple juice from can with enough water to make 1/2 cup.
Add orange juice, nutmeg and salt.
Mix in cream cheese and stir on low heat until smooth.
Drain and slice sweet potatoes.
Add with pineapple chunks to cream cheese mixture.
Add chopped pecans.
Put into a greased 1 1/2 quart casserole.
Top with more chopped pecans, if desired.
Bake at 350 degrees for 20 minutes.
Serve hot.

name: Baked Pineapple Casserole
directions: Set oven to 350 degrees.
Grease a 1-1/2-quart casserole dish.
Cream butter and sugar.
Add in eggs; beat until combined.
Stir in drained crushed pineapple and bread cubes.
Pour into prepared baking dish.
Bake for 45 minutes, until lightly browned.
Serve hot or cold.
Delicious!

name: Pineapple-Cinnamon Stuffing
directions: In a large mixing bowl, combine butter, sugar, eggs and crushed pineapple. Mix well.
Slowly add bread and stir well. The mixture will look a bit soupy in consistency.
Pour mixture into well greased baking dish.
Sprinkle top with a bit of cinnamon.
Bake in preheated 350°F oven, uncovered, for 1 hour.  Remove and let set for 15 minutes before serving.

name: Pineapple Casserole
directions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
Grease a medium-size casserole dish with butter.
In a large bowl, stir together the sugar and flour.
Gradually stir in the cheese.
Add the drained pineapple chunks, and stir until ingredients are well combined.
Pour the mixture into the prepared casserole dish.
In another medium bowl, combine the cracker crumbs, melted butter, and pineapple juice, stirring with a rubber spatula until evenly blended.
Spread crumb mixture on top of pineapple mixture.
Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until golden brown.

name: Pineapple Stuffing
directions: Mix butter and sugar.
Beat in eggs 1 at a time.
Stir in pineapple.
Fold in bread.
Pour into medium casserole dish(greased.).
Bake uncovered at 350 degrees for 1 hour.

name: Pineapple Casserole
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Grease a 2-quart casserole dish with 1 T. butter.
Drain pineapple.
Place crushed pineapple evenly along the bottom of prepared casserole dish.
Mix together the flour, sugar and cheese.
Sprinkle evenly on top of pineapple.
Cover with Ritz cracker crumbs.
Melt butter and pour over the top of cracker crumbs.
Bake for 30 minutes in preheated oven.

name: Pineapple Cheese Casserole
directions: Combine pineapple and cheese.
Mix flour and sugar in a small bowl and then stir into pineapple mixture.
Turn into buttered 1-1/2 quart casserole dish.
Combine melted butter with the Ritz crackers and sprinkle over the pineapple mixture.
Bake in a preheated 350 degree oven for 30 minutes.
Serve hot.

name: Hot Pineapple Salad
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
In a medium bowl, combine pineapple, sugar, flour and cheese.
Transfer to an 8-by-8-inch, 1 1/2 quart baking dish.
Top with crushed crackers and drizzle with melted butter.
Bake for 35 minutes.
Let stand 10 minutes before serving.

name: Rich Pineapple Casserole
directions: Using a mixer and mixing bowl, cream together butter and sugar.
Add beaten eggs and mix well.
Stir in pineapple and bread cubes.
Grease a casserole dish and spoon mixture into dish.
Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 45 minutes or until brown.

name: Creamy Pineapple Salad
directions: Drain pineapple, reserving the juice in a small saucepan.
Set pineapple aside.
Add enough water to juice to make 1-1/3 cups; bring to a boil.
Place gelatin in a bowl; add boiling liquid and stir to dissolve.
Cool until slightly thickened.
In a mixing bowl, whip cream; gradually beat in sugar.
Fold into the gelatin mixture. Stir in pineapple and cottage cheese; blend well.
Pour into a 1-1/2-qt. serving bowl; chill at least 3 hours or overnight.

name: Baked Pineapple
directions: Stir all ingredients together in oven safe dish and bake 45 minutes at 350.
Do not over bake.
This will set up more as it cools.

name: Three-Step Pineapple Casserole
directions: Combine sugar and flour in a medium bowl, and set aside.
Butter a 9x13 inch baking dish and layer in the following order: pineapple, sugar/flour mixture, shredded cheese, and cracker crumbs.
Drizzle melted margarine over top.
Bake uncovered at 350 degrees for 25 minutes, or until bubbly.

name: Holiday Pineapple Stuffing Bake
directions: Set oven to 350 degrees F.
Grease a 9-inch baking pan.
In a medium bowl cream the butter or margarine with sugar and salt (if using) until fluffy.
Add in eggs and beat until well combined.
Mix the drained crushed pineapple and the bread cubes.
Transfer to prepared baking dish.
Bake for 1 hour (allow to sit for about 5-10 minutes to firm up).
Delicious!

name: Pineapple Casserole
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Grease a 1 quart baking dish.
In a small bowl, mix together the sugar, flour, and salt.
Add eggs, pineapple with juice.  Mix well.
Pour into baking dish, top with bread cubes, and dot with butter.
Bake for 45 minutes or until top is golden brown.

name: Mimi's Pineapple Stuffing
directions: Preheat the oven to 350.
Mix the butter, egg, sugar and pineapple in a bowl. Add the torn up bread and mix until all the pieces are covered.
Pour the mixture into a small, greased casserole dish (8x8 or 7x11).
Sprinkle the brown sugar over the top and then bake for 45 minutes.

name: Pineapple Casserole
directions: Drain pineapples, reserving 3 TB of juices, and spread in bottom of dish.
Mix flour and sugar together, then stir in juice, spread over pineapple.
Stir in cheese.
Mix crumbs and butter. Pat on top of mixture.
Bake at 350 degrees for 15-20 minutes.

name: Hot Pineapple Casserole
directions: Drain pineapple.
Mix cheese, flour and sugar together and add to pineapple.
Place pineapple mixture into large square or rectangular greased casserole dish.
Top mixture with cracker crumbs.
Drizzle melted butter over crumb topping.
Bake in a pre-heated 350 degree oven for about 30 minutes.
Enjoy!

name: Pineapple Stuffing
directions: Preheat oven to 375.
Grease a 1 1/2 quart cassarole dish.
Combine and mix all ingredients thoroughly and place in baking dish.
Bake for 30-35 minutes, until golden brown.

name: Nan's Pineapple Casserole
directions: Spread drained pineapple into 9 x 13 pan
Mix cheese, brown sugar and flour and pour over pineapple.
Mix butter and crackers and spread over top.
Bake 25-30 minutes at 350 degrees.
Serve hot!

name: Pineapple Casserole
directions: Drain pineapple and save 3 tbsp of juice.
Mix flour, sugar and juice in bowl with spoon.
Add cheese and pineapple chunks, mix well.
Spoon into greased 13x9 casserole dish.
Melt butter and combine with crushed Ritz crackers.
Spread cracker topping evenly over pineapple and cheese mixture.
Bake at 350 for 35 to 40 minutes.

name: Pineapple and Bread Casserole
directions: Beat eggs.
Add sugar and pineapple with juice.
Melt butter, add to other ingredients with cubes.
Pour into a greased casserole dish.
Cook 1 hour at 350 degrees.

name: Pineapple and Peach Casserole
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Butter a 2 quart casserole dish.
In a large bowl, stir together the sugar and flour.
Gradually stir in the cheese.
Add the pineapple chunks and peaches, stir until well combined.
Pour the mixture into the prepared casserole.
In a medium bowl stir together the 1/2 cup melted butter, reserved pineapple juice, and the cracker crumbs, stirring with a rubber scraper until evenly blended.
Spread crumb mixture on top of pineapple mixture.
Bake for 35-45 minutes or until golden brown and bubbling.
Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.

name: Pineapple Casserole Bread
directions: Cream butter and sugar , add eggs, beat well.  Stir in pineapple and bread cubes.
Place in a well greased 1 1/2 quart casserole dish.
Bake at 350 degrees for 25 minutes or until golden brown and well set.
Serve warm.

name: Favorite Pineapple Stuffing
directions: Mix all ingredients together.  Pour into a greased 13 x 9 baking pan.  Bake, covered at 350° for 45 minutes.

name: Pineapple Casserole
directions: Mix sugar & flour. Stir in 4 tablespoons reserved pineapple juice.
Mix pineapple, cheese, melted butter and sugar mixture together.
Bake in 9x13 dish at 350 degrees for 20 minutes.
Lower temperature to 300 degrees, and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove from oven, and top with cracker crumbs.
Return to oven long enough to heat crumbs - about 5 minutes.

name: Pineapple Casserole
directions: Preheat oven to 350* .
Drain pineapple.
Beat eggs til mixed.
Combine all ingredients and place in a buttered glass bread pan.
Bake at 350 for about 1hr. Serve warm.
